mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A tightening labor market, indicated by declining unemployment and rising payrolls, signals stronger corporate earnings potential, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20-day returns in 60%+ of instances where PAYEMS > 150,000 and UNRATE < 3.5.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in industrial production and housing starts signals robust demand conditions, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20-day returns in 50%+ of instances where INDPRO > 105 and HOUST > 1200.

mechanism_narrative: Monetary tightening cycles, indicated by rising federal funds rates above 4.5%, compress equity valuations through higher discount rates, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day returns in 60%+ of instances where FEDFUNDS > 4.5%.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in industrial production signals weakening supply-side capacity, leading to higher inflation expectations and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in 60%+ of instances where INDPRO < 105.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent declines in retail sales and housing starts signal weakening demand conditions, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in 50%+ of instances where RSAFS < 500,000 and HOUST < 1150.

mechanism_narrative: A sudden increase in unemployment above 4.0% signals deteriorating labor market conditions, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day returns in 60%+ of instances where UNRATE > 4.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent disinflation, indicated by CPI below 2.0%, signals accommodative monetary policy, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5-day returns in 60%+ of instances where CPIAUCSL < 2.0%.
